title: Vendor latest OCICNI version
body:
This is needed for dual stack IPv6 support within CRI-O. Because the API
changed within OCICNI, we have to adapt the internal linux networking as
well.

comments.body:
`	github.com/containernetworking/cni v0.7.1`
Can we bump the CNI dependency here too? I think they're on 0.8.1 there.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *saschagrunert* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> `	github.com/containernetworking/cni v0.7.1`
> Can we bump the CNI dependency here too? I think they're on 0.8.1 there.

This is already the latest version :innocent:

Huh. Thought they bumped that to 0.8.1 too.

Alright then.
/lgtm
@saschagrunert have you tried the new dependency in CRI-O?  It seems to be causing issues: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/2595

> @saschagrunert have you tried the new dependency in CRI-O? It seems to be causing issues: [cri-o/cri-o#2595](https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/2595)

I have an open PR here where the changes are vendored: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/2447
Some things had to be updated, yeah. But I also spin up this one because I think we have to update the CNI plugins on the AMI machines to make the tests work again: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/2567

What issues are you referring to?
a mismatch for the CNI plugins version
Yes, this should be fixed with cri-o/cri-o#2567
